faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Piscataway, NJ?
faqs.answer: Ant control services in Piscataway typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and ant species involved. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Piscataway?
faqs.answer: Piscataway properties commonly experience carpenter ants, odorous house ants, pavement ants, and acrobat ants. Carpenter ants are particularly prevalent in areas with mature trees and wooden structures, while pavement ants frequently nest in cracks along driveways and foundations throughout residential neighborhoods.
